prompt: A professional and impactful quantum-tech game logo for "FORGOTTEN DOMAIN". The design combines a powerful icon of a stabilized quantum singularity—a sphere of swirling energy contained within sharp, geometric obsidian plates—with the text "FORGOTTEN DOMAIN" below. The typography is a high-tech, wide-kerning minimalist font with glowing cyan circuit-trace details. The feel is "Quantum Science" meets "Ancient Mystery". Colors: Deep obsidian, electric cyan, and subtle ultraviolet neon. Highly legible, cinematic, and memorable. Transparent background.
